text_block_list.text:
It's the morning of the JBC Classic, and Smart
Falcon has something she wants to do on the way
to the racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's been pretty chilly lately, don't you think? But
I've got just the thing to keep out the cold. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The JBC Classic! ☆ There's nothing like a heated
race on the dirt to warm you right up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Please come and watch!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Come see me again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thanks, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
For handing out flyers with me! I planned to do
this by myself, but you went out of your way to
help!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Since I've gotten so much stronger, I wanted to
do everything I can to get people to watch.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right! ☆ Let's hand out as many as we can with
the time we have!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well, no matter, what we'll still have a few—scratch that—tons left over...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Oh! Are you Smart Falcon, by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, yes, that's me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Pigs can't fly, but my pigtails will fly me to my
dreams. ☆ Leading the pack in cuteness, I'm the
one and only Falco! ☆

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I saw you perform! You've been working
really hard recently! I'll be rooting you on. And I'll
take one of those flyers, please!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...!
Thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text:
I'll take one too! I've heard things are really
starting to heat up in the dirt races.

text_block_list.name: Passerby D
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any plans today, so I might as well go
watch.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! I'm so happy to hear that. ☆ I'll be waiting
for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Passerby E
text_block_list.text: What's all the hubbub? ...The JBC Classic?
Some time later...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We gave out all the flyers... It's like a dream come
true...
choice_data_list: Things are starting to liven up!
Things are starting to liven up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You think so too? It's not just me?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Smart Falcon! Good luck today!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I'll be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow, look at all these people...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the word is out. Everyone's realizing
just how fun dirt races are.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...And that means I can't afford to let them down
today.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's my duty to put on a good race and top it off
with a super awesome concert!
